REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100016742) AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, JOSEPH

FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER TO COMPLAINT OF JOSEPH NUNEZ FILED ON 1/6/16 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100016742), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC SERVED DEC-07-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, JOSEPH

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-20-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOSEPH NUNEZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) (TRANSACTION ID # 100016742) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, JOSEPH $3,427.44 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,712.44, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, JOSEPH
